diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I called yesterday about the outage and I got 300 Primogems. But I lost Spiral Abyss progress and I was mid-push for a Season Pass milestone. I felt like my situation wasn't really heard. I wanted to try one more time.
[Agent] I'm really glad you called back, and I appreciate you telling me that. An 18-hour outage in the middle of a Season Pass window is genuinely painful, especially when Spiral Abyss resets and every run counts. Let me take a proper look and see what else we can do. Could I have your UID?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] And your HoYoverse email for verification?
[Caller] knakamura at email dot com.
[Agent] Thank you, Kaito, you're verified. Okay, I'm looking at incident INC202604161, Asia region, 18 hours between April 16th and 17th. Your UID is in the affected range and I can confirm you already received the standard 300 Primogems, that part was correct. Now, on top of that, the outage overlapped your Season Pass push and 18 hours is on the longer end of what our goodwill policy covers.
[Caller] Right.
[Agent] Here's what I can do. I'm going to escalate a goodwill top-up for you. Specifically, I'm adding 3 Intertwined Fates for the lost Spiral Abyss run attempts, and another 60 Primogems to cover the two daily commission sets you missed. That's on top of the 300 you already received.
[Caller] Oh wow, thank you.
[Agent] And for the Season Pass milestone, I'm also flagging your account for a 48-hour grace period on the current milestone window. That means when you do your next Spiral Abyss run in the next two days, the progress will count toward the milestone you were pushing for. I'll note that directly on the Season Pass ticket so the team honors it.
[Caller] That's huge. That's exactly what I was hoping for.
[Agent] I'm also going to send you a short written apology from us through in-game mail, so there's a record in your inbox. Let me read back what's coming your way so we confirm together, 3 Intertwined Fates, 60 additional Primogems, one written apology mail, and a 48-hour Season Pass milestone grace note. Goodwill ticket reference TK44526. Sound right?
[Caller] Yes, perfect.
[Agent] The mail should arrive within five minutes. And Kaito, thank you for being patient enough to call us back, I know that's not always easy when the first call didn't land right.
[Caller] Honestly, thank you. This is how it should have gone the first time.
[Agent] I really appreciate you saying that, we're always trying to do better. Anything else I can help you with today?
[Caller] No, that's everything. Thank you so much.
[Agent] Take care, Kaito. Enjoy your runs, and have a wonderful adventure in Teyvat!
